sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: CDMA Compare Job Found Aborted
parameters.body: One or more of the CDMA compare jobs was found aborted.

Command2.value: @concat('CREATE TABLE tempdb..TMP_CDMA_COMP', variables('TableTimestamp'), '(MCTR_ENTITY CHAR(4) NOT NULL, MCTR_TYPE CHAR(4) NOT NULL, CDMA_DOMAIN VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT CDMACNST', variables('TableTimestamp'), ' PRIMARY KEY NONCLUSTERED (MCTR_ENTITY, MCTR_TYPE, CDMA_DOMAIN))')

parameters.subject: CDMA FACTES Compare Aborted due to another compare processing
parameters.body:
CDMA FACETS compare processing can not run while another compare processing is being run.
Source = 'FACETS'
Target = 'CDMA'
Subject = 'CODES'
